name_cn:
ALMA Backpack #️⃣M47132
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to Chanel boutique specifications, with dynamic chip and serial number changes. Original factory materials, original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% authenticity! Original factory materials, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website latest gift box.
15 x 20 x 10 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Microfiber lining
Metal hardware
Double zipper closure
Padlock
Back pocket
Key case
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Half-length: 36.0 cm
Max half-length: 45.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
Made in France
